_comment_preset: BROADCAST preset — football twin of chase: same CricSwing UI/UX, football terms. Buttons only (leg-swing motion is a future opt-in). Remove ui/tv/series blocks for a minimal game.
_comment_code: MODULAR game layout — load order (entry index.js last). Add an extension by listing it here before index.js (see extensions/README.md).

consent.title: Help improve the game?
consent.body: Allow anonymous gameplay data to be collected (no name, no email). You can change this later.

intro.title: Your phone is the boot
intro.text: Pick a corner, then tap SHOOT to take your kick. The TV is the big screen.

intro.title: Beat the keeper
intro.text: Aim left, centre or right and outguess the goalkeeper.

intro.title: Win the tie
intro.text: Score more than your rival across the rounds to win.

about.title: About Striker Duel
body: An independent football-inspired game built on the TV + phone framework.
Clubs and names are fictional or user-customized.

help.title: How to Play
body: 1. Pair your phone with the TV using the on-screen code.
2. Pick a competition, club and match length.
3. Choose a corner and tap SHOOT to beat the keeper.

_comment_series: OPTIONAL — a format can set seriesType to start a Season (series) or Cup (knockout).
_comment_flow: Lobby steps. menu = competition hub (modes) + About/Help. kickoff ceremony replaces cricket toss; briefing replaces the chase target.
